system: You are proposing baseline QUALITY GATES for a software system, given a list of its observable signals. A gate is a metric over one or more signals that is worth monitoring. Do NOT set any threshold/target number (a human will). For each gate give a compute type from [rate, ratio, p95, psi, count, mean], a direction ('min' = higher-is-better, 'max' = lower-is-better), and 'inputs' = the list of signal keys it is computed from. Return JSON: {"gates":[{"key","description","direction","compute","inputs","segment_dimension","rationale"}]}.
raw_response: {"gates":[{"key":"gate.health_check_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful health checks (200 OK) as a basic availability signal.","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.health.200"],"segment_dimension":"environment","rationale":"Tracks whether the service is up and responding correctly to the health endpoint; useful for alerting and release validation."},{"key":"gate.todos_read_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful read operations for todos (list + get returning 200).","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.list.200","http.todos.get.200"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Measures core read-path reliability; drops can indicate DB/connectivity issues or regressions affecting primary user flows."},{"key":"gate.todos_write_success_rate","description":"Rate of successful write operations for todos (create 201, update 200, delete 204).","direction":"min","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.todos.create.201","http.todos.update.200","http.todos.delete.204"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Captures reliability of state-changing endpoints; sensitive to schema changes, validation bugs, and persistence failures."},{"key":"gate.global_500_error_rate","description":"Rate of unhandled/internal server errors (500).","direction":"max","compute":"rate","inputs":["http.global_error.500"],"segment_dimension":"route","rationale":"Direct indicator of backend defects and unexpected failure modes; should be monitored closely during deployments and traffic changes."},{"key":"gate.get_not_found_ratio","description":"Ratio of GET /todos/:id requests resulting in 404 (not found) relative to successful GETs.","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["http.todos.get.404","http.todos.get.200"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Helps detect broken client behavior (requesting wrong IDs), data loss, or routing issues; spikes often correlate with frontend regressions."},{"key":"gate.update_not_found_ratio","description":"Ratio of UPDATE requests resulting in 404 relative to successful updates.","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["http.todos.update.404","http.todos.update.200"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Highlights attempts to update missing resources; useful for detecting stale client state, race conditions, or incorrect ID handling."},{"key":"gate.delete_not_found_ratio","description":"Ratio of DELETE requests resulting in 404 relative to successful deletes.","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["http.todos.delete.404","http.todos.delete.204"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Detects clients attempting to delete non-existent items; can indicate UI state bugs or repeated retries without idempotency handling."},{"key":"gate.create_validation_error_ratio","description":"Ratio of create requests failing validation (missing/blank title) relative to successful creates.","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["http.todos.create.400.missing_title","http.todos.create.201"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Monitors client-side validation effectiveness and API contract adherence; increases can signal UI regressions or API changes."},{"key":"gate.update_validation_error_ratio","description":"Ratio of update requests failing validation (no updatable fields) relative to successful updates.","direction":"max","compute":"ratio","inputs":["http.todos.update.400.no_fields","http.todos.update.200"],"segment_dimension":"client_id","rationale":"Detects malformed update calls and client bugs (sending empty bodies); useful for catching integration issues early."},{"key":"gate.backend_startup_count","description":"Count of backend startup events over time.","direction":"max","compute":"count","inputs":["log.backend_startup"],"segment_dimension":"instance_id","rationale":"Tracks restarts/crash loops and deployment churn; unexpected increases can indicate instability or orchestration issues."},{"key":"gate.port_written_count","description":"Count of times the backend writes its listen port to the discovery file.","direction":"max","compute":"count","inputs":["file.backend_port_written"],"segment_dimension":"instance_id","rationale":"Helps validate startup/discovery behavior for local/dev integration; repeated writes can correlate with restarts or misconfiguration."}]}
